text.title: posttool-hook-self-correction Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for posttool-hook-self-correction as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: PostToolUse hook that runs the full project lint (ruff check .) instead of the changed file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Latency scales with project size, hook stalls every Edit, and unrelated pre-existing failures pollute the agent's view of its own change.

failure-mode.description: Slow validators (mypy strict on the whole repo, integration tests) wired as PostToolUse.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each Edit blocks for seconds-to-minutes — the agent thrashes and contexts blow up. Move slow checks to PreCommit or background tasks.
